title: dichanthelium leibergii
intro: Dichanthelium leibergii, also known as Leiberg's rosette grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass that is native to the mountainous regions of the Pacific Northwest in North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dichanthelium leibergii include soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use.
